title: Aalto University presents circular economy solutions at The Festival of the New European Bauhaus 2026
content:
Visit Aalto University’s The Pathfinders exhibition at NEB, 9–12.6.2026, and discover research tackling circular economy challenges.

The post Aalto University presents circular economy solutions at The Festival of the New European Bauhaus 2026 appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
snippet: Visit Aalto University’s The Pathfinders exhibition at NEB, 9–12.6.2026, and discover research tackling circular economy challenges.

title: Discover Finland’s Fiskars Village Art & Design Biennale
content:
Fiskars Village Art and Design Biennale brings together art, science, architecture and design, 7.6–30.8.2026 in Fiskars, Finland.

The post Discover Finland’s Fiskars Village Art & Design Biennale appeared first on Finnish Cultural Institute for the Benelux.
